action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py fails with 'torchaudio has no attribute info'. WavLM training completed with dev EER=0.0001. Analysis: Need to fix predict.py to not use torchaudio.info for bucketing - instead compute lengths during loading. Also need to update predict.py to use the WavLM model (best_wavlm.pt) which should generalize better to codec-degraded audio. Decision: Fix predict.py to remove torchaudio.info usage, use WavLM model, and submit eval.
action.command: python predict.py --data_path /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test --checkpoint checkpoints/best_wavlm.pt --output /tmp/test_predictions.json && echo 'predict.py test passed' && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/test_predictions.json')); print(f'Predictions: {len(d[\"predictions\"])} scores, range [{min(d[\"predictions\"]):.3f}, {max(d[\"predictions\"]):.3f}]')"
